alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a pyrazole ring, which is a five-member aromatic ring with two nitrogen atoms (at positions 1 and 2) and three carbon atoms.
alternative_parents.name: Pyrazoles

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a five-member saturated aliphatic heterocycle made up of two oxygen atoms, a boron atom, and three carbon atoms.
alternative_parents.name: Dioxaborolanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metalloid atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic metalloid salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a metalloid atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organometalloid compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Compounds comprising any derivative of the boronic acid functional group, with the general structure RB(X)Y (R=alkyl, aryl; X,Y= any O, N, Hal residue).
class.name: Boronic acid derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as boronic acid esters. These are compounds comprising the boronic acid ester functional group RN(X)OR' (R,R'=alkyl, aryl; X= any O, N, Hal residue).

direct_parent.description: Compounds comprising the boronic acid ester functional group RN(X)OR' (R,R'=alkyl, aryl; X= any O, N, Hal residue).
direct_parent.name: Boronic acid esters

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds comprising the boronic acid ester functional group RN(X)OR' (R,R'=alkyl, aryl; X= any O, N, Hal residue).
subclass.name: Boronic acid esters

superclass.description: Compounds an organic acid or a derivative thereof.
superclass.name: Organic acids and derivatives
